nasb.text: I will set a fire in Egypt; Sin will writhe in anguish, Thebes will be breached And Memphis will have distresses daily.

esv.text: And I will set fire to Egypt; Pelusium shall be in great agony; Thebes shall be breached, and Memphis shall face enemies by day.

cnv.text: 我必在埃及點起火來； 訓必有大痛苦； 挪必被攻破； 挪弗必終日受難。

ccb.text: 我要放火烧埃及， 训要受痛苦的折磨， 底比斯要被攻破， 挪弗终日惶恐不已，
